title: Hecco's Puffer Blocks
body:
Hey!
This is basically the first mod I've ever made, so I kept it simple. This mod only adds 1 block - the puffer block! The main functionality is that it inflicts poison whenever stood on (can be negated by crouching.)
Enjoy!

- adds the puffer block
  - crafted with 4 pufferfish
  - can be de-crafted into 4 pufferfish
  - can be rotated
  - inflicts poison when stepped on - negated by crouching
  - carrots and golden carrots can be fed to it
  - custom sounds for placing, breaking, hitting, and walking on it
  - can be found in the Building Blocks and Functional Blocks tab

The original pufferfish burp sound effect is from [this video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wqt5_59TLgE).

Demo: https://youtu.be/0ncwwmDsYdw
